name: claude-launch-browser-workflow
title: Claude Launch States Plus Browser Workflow
description: Modular assembly proof using split Sonnet 4.6 prompt-stack and completion-response primitives. Short launch-style clips that need a browser app as the background work surface plus Claude prompt-to-completion states, without Finder, Office, Codex terminal, or the full desktop lab; use `capture:claude-launch-browser-workflow-prompt` for the prompt beat.
